bug_description: observable.py stores strong references to observers, preventing garbage collection when observables are destroyed
root_cause: observable.py __init__ uses List[Any] for _observers instead of weakref.WeakSet
symptom: manager.py's memory grows unbounded - observer count remains high after destroy_all()
red_herring: observers.py has __del__ methods that look suspicious but aren't the problem
fix_location: src/observable.py __init__ - change _observers to use weakref.WeakSet() instead of list
verification: check.sh returns 1 when run, confirming tests fail due to memory leak
